description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a red, multi-level hip roof and cream-colored exterior walls. The building sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with several windows and doors distributed asymmetrically around the perimeter. The roof has a stepped design, creating visual interest and breaking up the massing of the house. The facade includes a main entrance and a few utility features, such as vents and possibly a garage or utility door. The windows are rectangular and vary in size, with some grouped together and others spaced apart. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on functional, suburban residential design.
description: A single-story cream bungalow with a red, multi-level hip roof and asymmetrical window placement, set on a green lawn. The design is modern and functional, with varied window sizes and a stepped roofline.
description_view_0: The front facade shows the main entrance, several windows, and utility features on a cream wall beneath a red, stepped hip roof.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a secondary entrance or utility door and a cluster of windows, with the stepped roof profile clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays fewer windows and a more continuous wall surface, with the roof's multi-level design prominent.
description_view_3: This side shows a mix of small and medium windows, with the roof's stepped sections and a utility feature near the corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
